message:
Restore ship:adder agent for CI automation

Bring back the adder subagent that was removed in 41c9206. The agent
enables autonomous changelog entry creation in CI without user prompts.

Changes:
- Use haiku model for faster, cost-effective execution
- Include ship:add and prose:technical-writing skills in frontmatter
- Remove Edit tool (not needed for changelog creation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ runs:
 
           IMPORTANT: Do NOT commit anything. Just create the changelog entry file.
           If there are no user-facing changes, do nothing.
-        claude_args: "--agent ship:adder --allowedTools Read,Glob,Grep,Bash,Write,Edit,Skill"
+        claude_args: "--agent ship:adder --allowedTools Read,Glob,Grep,Bash,Write,Skill"
         plugin_marketplaces: "https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins.git"
         plugins: |
           ship@tenzir

@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ description: Create a changelog entry for PR changes. Use for non-interactive CI
 tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Bash, Write, Skill
 model: haiku
 color: green
-skills: prose:technical-writing
+skills: ship:add, prose:technical-writing
 ---
 
 Create a changelog entry by running `/ship:add`.
